{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322031152FE10DA766532CFC30D55"}"},"total":353},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7523226189061636926","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"2025-7-4看完留个爪
靡靡跟今朝的感情好好磕啊，可是我还没看够啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊！！！！！！怎么就完结了（哭唧唧）（委屈巴巴）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751643480,"group_id":"7471853495809739800","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"是一把柚子叶吖～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6nMmOfqYkKUvcE6YkfQeJo=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/323b509622ae49e6bd0cd82b13b8ef99~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701141&x-signature=lcILoKpEGB8lWqRscDqebKdg0y0%3D","user_id":"329499140687278","user_name":"YiMe_橙子🍊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"329499140687278","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471853495809739800","book_info":{"abstract":"末世大佬温靡刚建立国家结束末世，一睁眼，成了书中恶毒京圈大小姐。
她为了夺回自己的未婚夫，四个哥哥，不择手段，丧心病狂，最终被哥哥们厌恶，家族抛弃，更被心爱之人扔给恶徒，失去清白，生下畸形儿，流落贫民窟，受尽虐辱惨死。
温靡表示，这剧情半点走不了，她脚踹男主未婚夫，手撕女主，提刀追着四个哥哥和渣父砍……她是来养老的，谁也别想耽误她过好日子。
她治好首脑外公，努力让十个军官舅舅脱单，让他们以后给自己养老，养最好看的小白脸……
她的日子越过越爽，全京却在火葬场：
四个哥哥跪在她面前：已知错，求妹妹原谅。
京圈豪门：已服，求放过。
她放手后，男女主去要饭了。
—————
京城第一家族掌权人傅京昭最痛恨女人，却因身受重伤，被温靡捡回养了。
世家少爷们都懵了：高傲如傅九爷，竟然愿意被一个小姑娘包养？？？！！！
傅京昭：只要是温靡就行。
傅京昭：金主大小姐她老想甩掉他？很急，在线等。
温靡：她养的小白脸当面温柔体贴样样好，背地里却是个煞神，爱吃醋就算了，还是终极大反派！怎么才能把他弄走？而且她的梦想，是当海王。
温靡情场走一遭，发现她渣过纯情医生，天才，财阀掌门人……都长得像她的小白脸——
现在跑路，还来得及吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9f009c1d3930192c165f491dc82946c4","author":"一路景","author_id":"","book_id":"7471853495809739800","book_name":"离谱！她外公京圈首长，谁敢惹？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5029人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1456,"name":"位尊权重","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1456&name=位尊权重&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7471853605557912088","read_count":"5029","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"653088"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"292","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,穿越,豪门世家,大小姐,大佬,位尊权重","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8efce3b5a1cc4f0940d591365e588191~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304312&x-signature=fBRCzRBKT0gZb2ahpPe65cOt5zc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2102688044823924","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"323"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322031152FE10DA766532CFC30D55"}"},"relate_info_list":[
